'''TelBrinTel Corporation''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] manufacturer based in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] known for its specialist and highly accurate [[Science droid/Legends|science droids]]. Its products were commonly found in [[University/Legends|universities]] and military research [[Laboratory/Legends|laboratories]]. The company expanded its product line with [[Paramedic droid|paramedic]] and [[Information-collating droid|information-collating units]].<ref name="EGTD" />
